marshallese.toggle_studio_tour: Ukōt itoitak in iṃōn jerbal eo
marshallese.welcome_to_the_art_design_studio: 🎨 Kwōn karuwainene ñan Iṃōn Annañ im Design!
marshallese.explore_15_interactive_tools_that_teac: Pukot 15 kein jerbal ko rej katakin eok kōn uno, annañ jān bwinbwin, design ej make kōṃṃan e, im wāween lale eṃṃan ñan aolep. Kajjojo tab ej juon jikin kōṃṃan eoktak. Erkein men ko kwōmaroñ kōṃṃani:
marshallese.explore_hsl_color_space_interactively: Pukot jikin uno HSL kōn peiṃ
marshallese.mix_paints_with_subtractive_color_theo: Kāreik uno kōn ḷōmṇak in uno ej bōk ḷọk (subtractive)
marshallese.create_pixel_art_on_a_grid_canvas: Kōṃṃan annañ pixel ioon juon grid
marshallese.draw_with_rotational_reflective_symmet: Jeje kōn jokkun wōt juon in dāpilpil im in kilaj
marshallese.mathematical_spiral_patterns_hypotroch: Wāween ko rej dāpilpil jān bwinbwin (hypotrochoids)
marshallese.flow_fields_particles_starfields_auror: Jikin tọọr, ṃōttan dikdik (particles), jikin iju, aurora
marshallese.virtual_spin_painting_with_physics: Uno ej dāpilpil ekkar ñan kien in physics
marshallese.geometric_string_patterns_on_pegs: Wāween to ko rej ḷoor geometry ioon dila
marshallese.optical_illusions_and_visual_tricks: Ṃoṇ ñan mejaṃ im wāween ṃoṇ ilo lale
marshallese.repeating_tile_patterns_like_m_c_esche: Wāween tile ko rej bar wanṃaanḷọk āinwōt M.C. Escher
marshallese.design_and_export_css_gradient_pattern: Kōṃṃan im kadiwōjḷọk wāween gradient in CSS
marshallese.harmony_desc: Keidi ainikien ko rej errā im ko rejjab errā, koba ratio in frequency ippān wāween, im ukōt kōtaan al ñan kokkeitaak ilo lale
marshallese.wcag_contrast_checker_for_accessibilit: Kein etale oktak in uno ekkar ñan WCAG bwe aolep ren maroñ lale
marshallese.color_theory_additive_vs_subtractive_m: Ḷōmṇak in uno (kāreik ej kobaḷọk ippān kāreik ej bōkḷọk, uno ko rej jelṃae doon, HSL/RGB), lain ko rej ip jān bwinbwin (hypotrochoids, Lissajous), fractals im aer āinwōt doon, geometry in tessellation, ekōjkan mejed ej lo op art, kien in WCAG ñan aolep, im annañ jān kōmpiuta. Kajjojo kein jerbal ej katakin bwinbwin eo ilo lowaan aiboojoj eo.
marshallese.color_wheel_hsl_hsv_complementary_pair: Wiiḷ in Uno — HSL/HSV + ruo uno rej jelṃae doon
marshallese.hue_0_360_around_the_wheel_saturation_: Hue (0-360 ipeḷaakin wiiḷ eo), saturation (erreo in uno), lightness (meram). Ko rej jelṃae doon rej pād jabweoṇ, ko repaak doon rej pād iturin doon, ko triadic rej 120° jān doon. Newton ear likūt aolep uno ioon juon wiiḷ ilo 1666.
marshallese.color_mixer_subtractive_vs_additive: Kein Kāreik Uno — bōkḷọk im kobaḷọk
marshallese.paint_and_print_subtractive_cmy_mixes_: Uno im jeje ilo peba = bōkḷọk (CMY ej kāreik im erom marok); meram im jikin annañ = kobaḷọk (RGB ej kāreik im erom mouj). Ejja laḷ in wōt, ak bwinbwin ko rej kanooj oktak — juon printer ej ḷōmṇak kōn plate K, juon TV ej ḷōmṇak kōn Hz.
marshallese.pixel_art_bitmap_craft_at_8_8_to_32_32: Annañ Pixel — jerbal in bitmap ilo 8×8 ñan 32×32
marshallese.each_pixel_is_a_deliberate_decision_ne: Kajjojo pixel ej juon pepe eṃōj ḷōmṇak kake. Sprites in NES rar likūt juon ri-kajoor ilo 16×16 ippān emān wōt uno. Algorithm in lain eo an Bresenham ej jeje lain ko rej jitpeeḷeḷ im ejjab kōjerbal nōṃba ko reṃōttan.
marshallese.symmetry_reflection_rotation_glide: Jokkun wōt juon — kilaj, dāpilpil, im jirilọk
marshallese.bilateral_mirror_rotational_n_fold_poi: Ruo rājet (kilaj), dāpilpil (n-fold), im juon point. 17 kumi in wallpaper rej kōkḷaḷ aolep wāween 2D ko rej bar wanṃaanḷọk — aolep jerbal ko an Escher.
marshallese.a_small_circle_rolls_inside_a_big_one_: Juon doulul edik ej dāpilpil ilowaan juon eḷap, im pen eo ej ettoḷọk jān lukwōn. Ratio in ruo radius ej kile joñan wūt ko; ettoḷọk in pen eo ej kile mijel eo. Kein ikkure eṇ eṃōj patent e ilo 1965, ak bwinbwin eo ear itok jān 1700 ko.
marshallese.generative_algorithm_randomness_as_art: Kōṃṃan make — algorithm + men ko rejjab jeḷā rej ri-kōṃṃan annañ
marshallese.sol_lewitt_wrote_instructions_the_wall: Sol LeWitt ear jeje naan in kaiñi wōt; ri-jerbal eo ioon kiin eṃ ear kōṃṃane. Rainin: Processing, p5.js, Cinder. “Ri-kōṃṃan annañ eo ej kien eo, ejjab tōprak eo.”
marshallese.spin_art_centripetal_physics_in_paint: Annañ in Dāpilpil — physics in kañūrñūr ñan lukwōn ilo uno
marshallese.drop_paint_spin_watch_it_fling_outward: Kabōjrak uno, kadāpilpil, im lale ekōjkan an kālọk ñan nabōj ilo wāween ip. Damien Hirst ear bōk millian ko jān wia annañ in dāpilpil. Ejja physics eo wōt in juon kein kaṃōrā salad; F = mω²r.
marshallese.string_art_curves_from_straight_lines: Annañ in To — lain ko rej ip jān lain ko rejiṃwe
marshallese.connect_every_n_th_nail_an_envelope_cu: Koba kajjojo dila kein ka N; juon lain envelope ej waḷọk. Mary Everest Boole ear kwaḷọk men in ñan kilaaj in bwinbwin ilo 1900. Cardioid eo jān lain ko rejiṃwe ej ṃool in kaṃōṇōṇō.
marshallese.op_art_fooling_the_visual_system: Op Art — ṃoṇe wāween ad lale
marshallese.bridget_riley_s_moir_fields_vasarely_s: Jikin moiré ko an Bridget Riley, grid ko an Vasarely. Cell ko ilo mejed rej lo ṃakūtkūt rej kanooj jerbal ñe oktak in uno ej kōṃṃakūt ṃōkaj — peij eo ej āinwōt *ej ṃakūtkūt*.
marshallese.every_periodic_2d_tiling_fits_one_of_1: Aolep tiling 2D ko rej bar wanṃaanḷọk rej tōpar juon iaan 17 kumi in jokkun wōt juon. Escher ear lo men in ke ear ilọk ñan Alhambra ilo 1936; innām ear kōjerbal 30 iiō ñan kōmate aolep.
marshallese.fractal_self_similar_at_every_scale: Fractal — ej āinwōt e make ilo aolep joñan
marshallese.mandelbrot_1975_cauliflower_coastlines: Mandelbrot 1975. Cauliflower, tōrerein āne, iaḷ in bōtōktōk, jarom, im jikin mennin emmenono — aolep rej fractal. “Kōdọ ko rejjab bọọḷ, toḷ ko rejjab kōn, im kilin wōjke ejjab meṇoknok.”
marshallese.gradient_smooth_color_transitions: Gradient — oktak in uno ejjeḷọk kabōjrak
marshallese.css_gives_you_linear_radial_and_conic_: CSS ej lewōj gradient linear, radial, im conic. Iiaḷ in kōdọ ko reṃool ewōr aolep uno ejjeḷọk kōjepel (ejjeḷọk ṃōttan rekōjenolọk) — “7 uno in iiaḷ in kōdọ” ear pepe eo an Newton kōn unin al.
marshallese.90s_magic_eye_craze_each_eye_sees_a_sl: Iien Magic Eye ilo 90 ko. Kajjojo mej ej lo juon annañ eṃōj an ṃakūtkūt jidik; eḷaññe kwōj kōṃṃan bwe mejaṃ ren jelṃae ak ren jepel jiṃwe, ḷōmṇak eo aṃ ej koba er ñan ṃwilaḷ. Ilo ṃool 5% in armej rejjab maroñ lo e — ejjab bōd eo aer.
marshallese.wcag_2_1_normal_text_4_5_1_large_3_1_w: WCAG 2.1: jeje edik 4.5:1, jeje eḷap 3:1. Unin an oktak edik in uno kōṃṃan apañ ñan ro emō an lale, meñe kwe kwōmaroñ riiti. APCA (eo ej itok ālikin WCAG 3.0) ej kōjerbal meram āinwōt mejed ej loe, ejjab ratio in luminance wōt.
marshallese.harmony_lab_hint: Keidi interval ko rej errā im ko rejjab errā, koba ratio in frequency ippān wāween, im ukōt kōtaan al ñan kokkeitaak ilo lale.
marshallese.click_the_wheel_to_pick_a_hue: Kalikkar wiiḷ eo ñan kāālōt juon hue
marshallese.repeats_a_pattern_around_a_central_poi: ej bar kōṃṃan juon wāween ipeḷaakin juon point eoḷap. Ilo
marshallese.starfish_5_fold_snowflakes_6_fold_and_: , iju in lọjet (5-fold), ṃōttan ice (6-fold), im wūt ko rej kwaḷọk men in ijoko otemjej.
marshallese.tile_patterns_quilts_floor_mosaics: Wāween tile, kọọj ko eṃōj kiil er, im mosaic ioon laḷ in eṃ.
marshallese.snowflakes_honeycombs_islamic_star_pat: Ṃōttan ice, iṃōn bwe, im wāween iju in Islam.
marshallese.mandala_art_rose_windows_in_cathedrals: Annañ mandala, im wūnto in wūt ilo iṃōn kabuñ ko reḷḷap.
marshallese.islamic_geometric_art_uses_radial_symm: Annañ in geometry an Islam ej kanooj kōjerbal jokkun wōt juon ipeḷaakin lukwōn. Kōbabbab in Celtic, nuknuk in Navajo, im kakōḷḷe in baaṃle ko in Japan (“mon”) aolep rej atartar ioon jokkun wōt juon in dāpilpil.
marshallese.uses_bilateral_reflection_symmetry_the: ej kōjerbal jokkun wōt juon in ruo rājet (kilaj) — eo jej loe ilo turin mejān armej, babbūb, im bōlōk. Eñin jokkun wōt juon eo eḷaptata ippān menninmour.
marshallese.cycles_through_the_color_spectrum_as_y: ej etal ilo aolep uno ñe kwōj jeje, im ej make kōṃṃan mandala ko rej āinwōt gradient.
marshallese.the_quick_brown_fox_jumps_over_the_laz: Fox eo eṃōkaj ej kālọk ioon kidu eo ejowan
marshallese.sculpt_failed: Jekjek eo ear jab tōprak — kajjioñ juon kōmeḷeḷe epidodo ḷọk.
marshallese.sculpt_canvas: Annañ in jekjek 3D. Iper ñan kadāpilpil.
marshallese.sculpt_presets: Jino jān juon wāween eṃōj kōpooje
marshallese.sculpt_move: Kōṃṃakūt ṃōttan eo eṃōj kāālōt e
marshallese.sculpt_create_ph: Ak kōmeḷeḷeik juon men ñan jekjek…
marshallese.sculpt_ai_label: Kōmeḷeḷeik juon jekjek ak juon oktak
marshallese.sculpt_gallery_empty: Jekjek ko eṃōj kōjparok er renaaj waḷọk ijin.
marshallese.maximum_contrast_pop_art_brand_accents: Oktak eḷaptata. Pop art im kakōḷḷe in brand.
marshallese.vibrant_but_balanced_childrens_books_c: Erreo ak ejejjet. Bok in ajri im cartoon.
marshallese.rich_palette_with_two_opposing_pairs: Juon palette eobrak ippān ruo pair rej jelṃae doon.
marshallese.adjust_base_hue_saturation_lightness_v: Ukōt hue eo jinoin, saturation, oktak in meram, dāpilpil, im joñan palette eo. Widget eo ej kwaḷọk juon palette in kokkeitaak ej mour, im ej kōkḷaḷe ñan juon iaan ḷalem kain kokkeitaak. Ejjeḷọk point, ejjeḷọk uwaak — kwōn kajjioñ im lale ta ko rej kōṃṃan kain kokkeitaak rot.
marshallese.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Ḷōmṇak in jino (jeje anemkwōj — ejjeḷọk uwaak ejiṃwe): Ta eo ej kōṃṃan bwe juon palette en errā ak en jab errā?
marshallese.stuck_show_open_prompts_no_answers: 🤔 Ij bōjrak — kwaḷọk kajjitōk ko repeḷḷọk (ejjeḷọk uwaak)
marshallese.open_prompts_investigate_by_manipulati: Kajjitōk ko repeḷḷọk — pukot kōn aṃ ukukōt:
marshallese.find_the_smallest_palette_that_still_f: Pukot palette eo edik tata ak ej ṃōj wōt ippaṃ.
marshallese.real_impressionists_used_analogous_pal: Ri-annañ in impressionist ro rar kōjerbal palette analogous. Etke raar kōṃṃan men in?
marshallese.some_color_schemes_have_proper_names_c: Jet wāween uno ewōr etaer make (complementary, split-complementary, triadic). Kwōn pukot etaer im kajjioñ kōṃṃan bar juon alen.
marshallese.high_saturation_many_colors_busy_try_d: Saturation eḷap + elōñ uno = ekūtōtō. Kajjioñ kadikḷọk saturation kōn slider in kāreik — ta ej waḷọk ñan "kokkeitaak"?
marshallese.i_think_i_understand_color_harmony_now: Ij ḷōmṇak kiiō ij meḷeḷe kokkeitaak in uno — in kōmeḷeḷeik kōn naan ko aō make
marshallese.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_hue_s: Kōmeḷeḷeik kōn naan ko aṃ make: ekōjkan an ettoḷọk in hue, saturation, im joñan palette kile "kokkeitaak"?
marshallese.design_note_discrete_5_state_harmony_m: Kōjjeḷā kōn design: ewōr ḷalem wōt jeṃṃaan in kokkeitaak; wiiḷ in SVG ej kwaḷọk ijoko uno ko rej pād ie; ejjeḷọk point ñan "palette eṃṃan" — eñin wāween eo eṃōj kōpooje.
marshallese.the_path_traced_by_a_point_on_a_small_: — iaḷ eo juon point ioon juon doulul edik ej kōṃṃane ñe ej dāpilpil ilowaan juon eḷapḷọk. Wāween eo ej ḷoor
marshallese.greatest_common_divisor_of_the_two_rad: (nōṃba eḷaptata ej ajeji erro) in ruo radius ko. Ñe R/r ej juon ratio epidodo, edik wūt ko; ratio ko rejjab pidodo rej kōṃṃan iaḷ ko rekūtōtō im rejjab bar wanṃaanḷọk.
marshallese.particle_density: Joñan an obrak kōn ṃōttan dikdik
marshallese.generative_art_canvas: Jikin annañ ej make kōṃṃan e
marshallese.click_or_drag_on_the_canvas_to_create_: 👆 Kalikkar ak iper ioon jikin eo ñan kōṃṃan an ṃōttan dikdik jeplōklōk
marshallese.click_and_drag_to_drip_paint_on_the_sp: 👆 Kalikkar im iper ñan kabōjrak uno ioon jikin eo ej dāpilpil
marshallese.in_a_spinning_reference_frame_objects_: Ilowaan juon jikin ej dāpilpil, men ko rej eñjake juon kajoor ej jibwe er ñan nabōj ekkar ñan aer ettoḷọk jān lukwōn im ṃōkajin dāpilpil eo eṃōj kōjepel e ruo alen (ω²r).
marshallese.real_spin_art_uses_centripetal_acceler: Annañ in dāpilpil eṃool ej kōjerbal kañūrñūr ñan lukwōn ñan kajeplōklōk uno. Uno emeoeo ej kālọk ñan nabōj ṃōkaj ḷọk; uno emijel ej kōṃṃan lain ko rekadu im rej pedped.
marshallese.the_combination_of_rotational_motion_a: Kōttāik dāpilpil ippān mijel in uno ej make kōṃṃan ip im wāween interference. Ejjeḷọk ruo annañ in dāpilpil rej āinwōt juon — ej juon kain
marshallese.from_straight_lines_with_a_circle_and_: jān lain ko rejiṃwe. Ippān juon doulul im kein kōṃṃan alen 2, kwōj bōk juon
marshallese.the_heart_shaped_curve_seen_in_coffee_: — lain eo āinwōt būruo, eo jej loe ilowaan kab in coffee. Kein kōṃṃan alen 3 ej kōṃṃan juon
marshallese.higher_multipliers_create_intricate_pa: . Kein kōṃṃan alen ko reḷapḷọk rej kōṃṃan wāween ko rekūtōtō ekkar ñan
marshallese.nail_n_connects_to_nail_n_m_mod_total: : dila N ej koba ippān dila (N × M) mod aolepān.
marshallese.optical_art_emerged_in_the_1960s_pione: (Optical Art) ear waḷọk ilo 1960 ko, im ro rar jino e rej
marshallese.it_exploits_the_mechanics_of_human_vis: . Ej kōjerbal wāween ad lale ñan kōṃṃan ṃoṇ in ṃakūtkūt, wūdiddid, im ṃwilaḷ ioon men ko reppāt.
marshallese.appear_when_two_regular_grids_overlap_: rej waḷọk ñe ruo grid rejjejjet rej pād ioon doon ippān juon angle edik. Ḷōmṇak eo aṃ ejjab maroñ kōjepel wāween ko rejelṃae doon, im ej kōṃṃan lain im ṇo ko rejjab pād. Ejja men in ej kōṃṃan an jet nuknuk romraṃraṃ.
marshallese.occur_when_highly_saturated_complement: rej waḷọk ñe uno ko rej jelṃae doon im eḷap aer saturation rej pād iturin doon. Ṃōttan mejaṃ ko rej lo uno rej ire, im rej kōṃṃan juon tōrerein ej ñūrñūr im ejjab pen — men in etan
marshallese.persistence_of_vision: Pād wōt in annañ ilo mej
marshallese.in_the_retina_are_the_main_perceptual_: ilowaan retina rej wāween ko reḷap ilo ad lale. Wāween doulul ko rej kobaḷọk ippān doon rej kōṃṃan an mejed ṃakūtkūt ilo jab ad kōṇaan, im annañ eo ej āinwōt ej emmenono im ṃakūtkūt.
marshallese.or_tiling_covers_a_plane_with_shapes_t: (ak tiling) ej kalibubu juon jikin eppāt kōn wāween ko rej ekkejel ippān doon ejjeḷọk rọñ ak jab pād ioon doon. Jilu wōt polygon rejjejjet remaroñ make kalibubu:
marshallese.equilateral_triangles: jilu kona ko rejjejjet rājet ko aer
marshallese.1898_1972_transformed_simple_tilings_i: (1898–1972) ear ukōt tiling ko repidodo ñan annañ kōn an ip tōrerein tile ko. Wāween eo an: ip juon rājet in wāween eo innām kopi ejja ip eo wōt ñan rājet eo juon, bwe tile ko ren ekkejel wōt jiṃwe. Eñin pedped eo an
marshallese.uses_tessellations_extensively_combini: ej kanooj kōjerbal tessellation — ej koba iju, jiljino kona, im wāween ko rej ekkejel ippān doon āinwōt ilo iṃōn kabuñ ko āinwōt Alhambra. Wāween kein rej ḷoor kien in bwinbwin repen ak rej kōṃṃan aiboojoj eḷap.
marshallese.tessellations_use_three_key_operations: Tessellation ej kōjerbal jilu jerbal ko reḷap —
marshallese.flip_every_tessellation_can_be_classif: (ukōt jab ko). Aolep tessellation remaroñ kōkḷaḷ ñan juon iaan 17 'kumi in wallpaper'.
marshallese.click_tiles_to_cycle_their_colors: 👆 Kalikkar tile ko ñan ukukōt uno ko aer
marshallese.is_generated_by_iterating_z_z_c_for_ev: eṃōj kōṃṃane kōn kōṃṃan z = z² + c elōñ alen ñan aolep point c ilo jikin complex. Point ko ijo |z| ej pād wōt (ejjab eḷapḷọk jān 2) rej 'ilowaan' set eo. Tōrerein ej kwaḷọk
marshallese.use_the_same_formula_but_fix_c_and_var: rej kōjerbal ejja formula eo wōt ak rej dāpij c im ukōt z eo ej jino jān e. Kajjojo point in Mandelbrot ej kōṃṃan juon Julia set eoktak — point ko ilowaan Mandelbrot rej kōṃṃan Julia ko rej koba ippān doon; point ko ilikin rej kōṃṃan 'Fatou sets' rej āinwōt bwidej.
marshallese.fractal_modifies_the_iteration_to_z_re: fractal ej ukōt alen ko ñan z = (|Re(z)| + i|Im(z)|)² + c, im ej kōṃṃan juon wāween ejjab jokkun wōt juon āinwōt juon wa ej urur. Michael Michelitsch im Otto Rössler raar loe ilo 1992.
marshallese.is_built_by_the_chaos_game_pick_a_rand: eṃōj kalōk e kōn 'ikkure in ejjeḷọk kien': kāālōt juon point jabdewōt, innām elōñ alen kālọk jimattan in iaḷ eo ñan juon kona kwaar kāālōte ilo jab jeḷā. Men eo ekabwilōñlōñ, jerbal in ejjab jeḷā kake ej kōṃṃan juon fractal ej jiṃwe an āinwōt e make.
marshallese.1924_2010_coined_the_word_fractal_from: (1924–2010) ear kōṃṃan naan eo 'fractal' jān naan in Latin 'fractus' (eṃōj rupe). Ear kwaḷọk bwe tōrerein āne, toḷ, iaḷ in bōtōktōk, im wia in jāān aolep rej kwaḷọk geometry in fractal —
marshallese.double_click_to_zoom_in_scroll_wheel_t: 👆 Ruo alen kalikkar ñan kaḷapḷọk • Wiiḷ in scroll ñan kaḷapḷọk/kadikḷọk
marshallese.screens_create_gradients_by_mixing: 🌈 Jikin annañ ko rej kōṃṃan gradient kōn aer kāreik
marshallese.each_pixel_blends_red_green_and_blue_l: . Kajjojo pixel ej kāreik meram būrōrō, maroro, im bulu ilo joñan ko rej oktak. Juon gradient ej ukukōt joñan kein jidik jidik ilo jikin eo.
marshallese.produces_more_perceptually_uniform_gra: ej kōṃṃan gradient ko rejjejjet ñan mejed eḷap jān RGB. Etal jān būrōrō ñan bulu ilo RGB ej deblọk iiōk kilmeej ejjab erreo; ilo HSL, ej deblọk uno ko rerreo im aiboojoj — āinwōt ekōjkan juon ri-uno ej kāreiki.
marshallese.real_world_gradients: Gradient ko ilo laḷ in eṃool
marshallese.are_everywhere_sunsets_rayleigh_scatte: rej pād ijoko otemjej: tulọk in aḷ (Rayleigh scattering ej kōjepel aetokin ṇo in meram), iiaḷ in kōdọ (an meram rup ej kōkḷaḷ e ekkar ñan frequency), im ṃwilaḷ in lọjet (dān ej bōk būrōrō ṃokta, im bulu eṃwilaḷ ej pād wōt).
marshallese.sweep_color_around_a_center_point_like: rej kōṃṃakūt uno ipeḷaakin juon point eoḷap āinwōt juon wiiḷ in uno. Rej kōjerbal er ilo chart in pie, kein kwaḷọk kōttar, im kwaḷọk data. CSS ear jino jipañ conic-gradient ilo 2020 wōt!
marshallese.use_gradients_to_create_depth_direct_a: rej kōjerbal gradient ñan kōṃṃan ṃwilaḷ, ñan tōl mejed, im ñan kōṃṃakūt eñjake. Gradient jān bwil ñan ṃōḷo ej kwaḷọk ṃwilaḷ (atmospheric perspective); jān meram ñan marok ej kwaḷọk kilep (chiaroscuro).
marshallese.describe_an_object_for_a_depth_map_or_: Kōmeḷeḷeik juon men ñan juon map in ṃwilaḷ ak juon wāween ñan juon pattern...
marshallese.generate_ai_depth_map: Kōṃṃan Map in Ṃwilaḷ kōn AI
marshallese.generate_ai_pattern_tile: Kōṃṃan Tile in Wāween kōn AI
marshallese.white_pops_out_gray_middle_black_far: Mouj = ej waḷọk ñan nabōj • Iiōk kilmeej = eoḷap • Kilmeej = ettoḷọk
marshallese.your_eyes_are_6_cm_apart: Mejaṃ ko rej ~6 cm jān doon
marshallese.so_each_sees_the_world_from_a_slightly: , kōn men in kajjojo ej lo laḷ in jān juon angle eoktak jidik. Ḷōmṇak eo aṃ ej koba ruo lale kein bwe kwōn lo
marshallese.magic_eye_images_hide_3d_shapes_in_a_r: (annañ in Magic Eye™) rej ṇooj wāween 3D ilowaan juon pattern ej bar wanṃaanḷọk. Wāween eo: ijo men eo ettino ej 'epaak,' pattern eo ej bar wanṃaanḷọk ippān
marshallese.where_it_s_far_the_period_is_longer_yo: ; ijo ej 'ettoḷọk,' iien eo eaetok ḷọk. Ḷōmṇak eo aṃ ej meḷeḷeik oktak in iien kein āinwōt ṃwilaḷ.
marshallese.1993_94_by_tom_baccei_and_cheri_smith_: (1993–94) ko Tom Baccei im Cheri Smith raar kōṃṃani raar wia ḷapḷọk jān 25 million ipeḷaakin laḷ in. Dr. Christopher Tyler ear jino wāween in autostereogram ilo 1979.
marshallese.to_see_the_image_hold_your_face_close_: 🧠 Ñan lo annañ eo: kepaak turin mejaṃ ñan jikin annañ eo, kakkijeik mejaṃ āinwōt kwōj lale 'deblọk' annañ eo ñan juon kiin eṃ ettoḷọk, innām jidik jidik rọọl likḷọk. Wāween 3D eo enaaj 'waḷọk'. Etan men in
marshallese.have_difficulty_seeing_stereograms_due: epen aer lo stereogram kōn men ko āinwōt amblyopia (mej ejowan), strabismus (mej ejelṃae), ak oktak ko jet ilo lale kōn ruo mej. Men in ejjeḷọk an nana!
marshallese.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_i: Kakkijeik mejaṃ im lale 'deblọk' annañ eo ñan lo 3D
marshallese.hold_your_face_close_to_the_screen: Kepaak turin mejaṃ ñan jikin annañ eo
marshallese.relax_your_eyes_try_to_look_through_th: Kakkijeik mejaṃ — kajjioñ lale 'deblọk' annañ eo ñan juon kiin eṃ ilikin
marshallese.slowly_move_back_a_3d_shape_will_emerg: Jidik jidik rọọl likḷọk. Juon wāween 3D enaaj waḷọk!
marshallese.tip_the_two_guide_dots_above_should_ap: Kōjjeḷā: ruo point ko ilōñ ren waḷọk āinwōt jilu ñe mejaṃ rejejjet
marshallese.create_animated_3d_stereograms_from_pr: Kōṃṃan stereogram 3D ko rej ṃakūtkūt jān wāween ko eṃōj kōpooji, annañ ko kwaar jeje, annañ ko kwaar upload, transform, ak map in ṃwilaḷ ko AI ear kōṃṃani!
marshallese.draw_a_depth_map_capture_it_as_a_keyfr: Jeje juon map in ṃwilaḷ, bōke āinwōt juon keyframe, innām jeje eo juon. Ṃakūtkūt eo enaaj koba er ippān doon.
marshallese.upload_depth_map_image: 📂 Upload Annañ in Map in Ṃwilaḷ
marshallese.upload_a_grayscale_image_white_near_bl: Upload juon annañ iiōk kilmeej (mouj = epaak, kilmeej = ettoḷọk). Enaaj ṃakūtkūt kōn transform eo eṃōj kāālōt e.
marshallese.upload_depth_map_image_2: Upload annañ in map in ṃwilaḷ
marshallese.animates_the_depth_map_from_the_static: Ej kōṃṃakūt map in ṃwilaḷ eo jān tab in Ejjab ṃakūtkūt kōn juon transform eṃōj kāālōt e. Ṃokta ilọk ñan Ejjab ṃakūtkūt ñan jeje map eo aṃ.
marshallese.tip_draw_a_depth_map_in_the_static_tab: 💡 Kōjjeḷā: Ṃokta jeje juon map in ṃwilaḷ ilo tab in Ejjab ṃakūtkūt, innām rọọltok ijin ñan kōṃṃakūt e kōn juon transform.
marshallese.ai_generated_depth_map: 🤖 Map in Ṃwilaḷ AI ear Kōṃṃane
marshallese.describe_a_3d_scene_and_ai_will_genera: Kōmeḷeḷeik juon annañ 3D innām AI enaaj kōṃṃan juon map in ṃwilaḷ, im ej kōṃṃakūt e kōn juon transform.
marshallese.e_g_a_glowing_crystal_orb_floating_in_: waanjoñak: Juon bọọḷ crystal ej romaak im ettōḷọk ilo lañ...
marshallese.generate_ai_depth_map_for_animation: Kōṃṃan Map in Ṃwilaḷ kōn AI ñan Ṃakūtkūt
marshallese.ai_depth_map_ready: ✅ Map in ṃwilaḷ in AI epojak!
marshallese.ai_motion_calls_gemini_to_plan_poses_t: Ṃakūtkūt in AI ej kūr Gemini ñan karōk jutak ko innām Imagen ej kōṃṃan kajjojo frame āinwōt juon map in ṃwilaḷ make. ~5–7s ñan juon frame; ejjab eḷḷā jān rate-limit.
marshallese.ai_image_generation_is_not_available_u: ⚠️ Kōṃṃan annañ kōn AI ejjab pād. Kōjerbal wāween ko Preset, Jeje, Upload, ak Ukōt.
marshallese.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_a: Kakkijeik mejaṃ im lale 'deblọk' ṃakūtkūt eo ñan lo an wāween 3D ṃakūtkūt
marshallese.tips_for_animated_stereograms: 💡 Kōjjeḷā ñan Stereogram ko rej Ṃakūtkūt
marshallese.lock_your_eyes_into_the_3d_view_before: Kapen mejaṃ ilo lale 3D ṃokta jān aṃ kalikkar Play
marshallese.slower_speeds_4_6_fps_are_easier_to_ma: Ṃōkaj ko rejjab kanooj ṃōkaj (4–6 FPS) rej pidodo ñan dāpij lale eo
marshallese.pulse_and_heart_presets_are_the_easies: Preset ko Ṃakūtkūt in menono im Būruo rej pidodo tata ñan lo er ñe rej ṃakūtkūt
marshallese.the_exported_gif_can_be_printed_frame_: GIF eo eṃōj kadiwōjḷọk e remaroñ jeje ilo peba frame ñan frame āinwōt juon bok in annañ ej ṃakūtkūt!
